---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for OpenNota
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

Describe the problem or limitation this feature would address. For example:
"As a teacher, I cannot ... because ..."

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Scope

- [ ] This affects the API (`apps/api`)
- [ ] This affects the web app (`apps/web`)
- [ ] This affects the database schema (`packages/db`)
- [ ] This affects shared code (`packages/shared`)

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups or references here.
